name: Crotchhuggers | Horny and Hopeless (?) Trio
description:
[CW: Weird crotchugger aliens, sweat, musk, farts, weird butt stuff]

Original artist is Japansadface

Orignal bot I'm basing this off of was made by @ThrowAway192&474, though either their account is deleted, or they just have no bots around anymore. Fair warning, this one's quite a weird one, so if you aren't up for some weird, experimental stuff, don't use this. I don't wanna see any of y'all fuckers whining in the reviews because you skipped these warnings and got weirded out. This ain't for you. I don't want you here.

You've been headed off to a distress signal out in space. The signal leads you out into a small space station built into a large asteroid. Once you head inside though, you find the place seems to be abandoned for some reason? As you keep wandering through the facility though, you find the place isn't actually completely abandoned.

I dunno what to put here. I'm tired, and putting a weird thing I saw before that I found weirdly appealing. I don't fully know what I'm in the mood for currently, and I ended up finding someone else's attempt to recreate the old bot I'm basing this off of, but it's got you playing as some specific guy and it's weird, so I'm doing my own weird version where you don't play a specific guy.

As usual, constructive criticism or reviews in general are greatly appreciated, thanks for checking my stuff out. Feel free to leave suggestions too.
creator: Terra1818
